# L3 — l2-operations

## Anchors

- `kacho.cloud.operation.OperationService/Cancel`
- `kacho.cloud.operation.OperationService/Get`

## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| OperationService/Cancel | (CancelOperationRequest) → Operation | POST /operations/{operation_id}:cancel |
| OperationService/Get | (GetOperationRequest) → Operation | GET /operations/{operation_id} |

## Call tree

- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-vpc/internal/handler.OperationHandler).Cancel` — Cancel обрабатывает RPC OperationService.Cancel — отменяет Operation по id.
  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-vpc/internal/handler.operationToProto` — operationToProto конвертирует domain Operation в proto Operation.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-vpc/internal/handler.OperationHandler).Get` — Get обрабатывает RPC OperationService.Get — возвращает Operation по id.
